title: iberis intermedia var. dunalii
intro: Iberis intermedia var. dunalii, also known as Dwarf Candytuft, is a perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and edible leaves. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Iberis intermedia var. dunalii have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to their antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Iberis intermedia var. dunalii include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and easing respiratory congestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, or used in salads, to harness its medicinal and nutritional properties.
